message:
fix: dynamic card config crash and GitHubActivity magic number (#4568)

Two GA4 error fixes from the remaining code review findings:

1. Dynamic card config crash (~9 errors/week on /alerts): User-written
   card code that destructures config (e.g. `const { filter } = config`)
   crashes when config is undefined. Wrap compiled components to
   guarantee config is always an object via `props.config ?? {}`.

2. GitHubActivity magic number: Replace hardcoded 60_000 polling
   interval with POLL_INTERVAL_SLOW_MS from network constants.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
